briefs.title: Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation amended — new Schedule 1 entries take effect February 4
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 5/2026 amends the Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation (B.C. Reg. 175/2004) by adding new entries to Schedule 1, effective February 4, 2026. The amendment expands the list of bylaw contraventions enforceable via notice under the Local Government Bylaw Notice Enforcement Act.
briefs.action_required: Review the updated Schedule 1 to identify any new bylaw contraventions that may apply to your business operations.

key_dates.label: BC Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation Schedule 1 amendment takes effect

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Retail
